auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in or register through Kaemnur.com so your KaemForm license follows your account.
auth.adminLoginSubtitle: Hidden manual access for the Kaemnur build.
auth.registerSubtitle: Register through Kaemnur to activate your license.
auth.signupSuccess: Account created. If email verification is enabled, open the inbox link first, then sign in.
auth.kaemnurInfo: License and Pro status are synced from the Kaemnur account.
auth.manualInfo: Manual sign in is only available through the private admin page.
auth.adminManualInfo: This account receives local Pro access for administration.
auth.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?

errors.invalid_token: The sign-in link is invalid or has expired.
errors.not_registered: Account not registered. Please contact an admin or sign up first.
errors.weak_password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.provider_disabled: Direct Google login is disabled. Sign in through Kaemnur.com.
errors.bridge_unconfigured: Kaemnur login is not configured yet. Contact the administrator.
errors.account_conflict: This account is already connected to another KaemForm account. Contact the administrator.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong while signing in. Please try again.

onboarding.title: Welcome to KaemForm
onboarding.subtitle: Create your first workspace to start building forms.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.limitReached: Workspace limit reached for your plan.
dashboard.emptyDescription: Create a workspace to manage your forms.

workspace.emptyDescription: Create your first form to start collecting responses.
workspace.deleteWorkspaceConfirm: The workspace and all its forms will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
workspace.limitFormsReached: Form limit reached for this workspace.
workspace.formStorageNotice: This form uses {count}/{limit} cloud responses. Retention is {days} days; sync to desktop before data expires.

form.deleteConfirmDescription: The form "{title}" will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
form.publishConfirmDescription: The form will be publicly accessible via its link. The slug cannot be changed after publishing.
form.publishRequiresField: Add at least 1 field before publishing.
form.closeConfirmDescription: The form will no longer accept new responses.
form.reopenConfirmDescription: The form will start accepting new responses again.

builder.previewSubmitNotice: This is a preview, the response will not be saved.

canvas.empty: Drag a field from the left panel

sectionModeHints.single: All sections appear sequentially on one page.
sectionModeHints.paged: Each section becomes a separate page with next/back navigation.

formSettings.title: Form Settings
formSettings.description: Set form color, quiz mode, and randomization.
formSettings.randomHint: Randomization applies when respondents open the form or when preview reloads.

builder.noFieldSelected: Select a field to edit its properties

publicForm.closedDescription: This form is no longer accepting responses.
publicForm.fullDescription: This form has reached its response limit.
publicForm.loginRequiredDescription: You must sign in to fill out this form.
publicForm.successDefault: Thank you, your response has been recorded.

signature.disclaimer: This signature is a confirmation, not a certified electronic signature.

responses.title: Responses
responses.emptyDescription: Share the form link to start collecting responses.
responses.retentionWarning: Some responses will be deleted in less than 7 days.
responses.retentionCountdown: The soonest response auto-deletes in {days} days ({date}).
responses.retentionBackupHint: Back up in KaemDesktop before retention ends.
responses.pdfUpgradeRequired: PDF export requires a Pro license.

formSettings.title: Form Settings
formSettings.slugHint: The slug cannot be changed after the form is published.
formSettings.customLinkHint: Use 3–50 lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens.
formSettings.slugProHint: Custom slugs require a Pro license.
formSettings.requireLoginLabel: Require login to fill out the form

sectionModeHints.single: All sections appear sequentially on one form page.
sectionModeHints.paged: Sections appear as step-by-step pages with next and back navigation.

formSettings.retentionInfo: Responses for this form are stored for {days} days before being automatically deleted.
formSettings.dangerCloseDescription: The form will no longer accept new responses. You can reopen it later.
formSettings.dangerDeleteDescription: The form and all its responses will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

appSettings.title: Account Settings
appSettings.licenseStandaloneNote: Your license is synced from Kaemnur. Enter the license code after buying or extending a license.
appSettings.licenseInputHint: Use the license code from your Kaemnur.com purchase.
appSettings.licenseFailed: License code is invalid or failed to sync
appSettings.trialCountdownDescription: Trial ends on {date}. The countdown keeps running even if a workspace is deleted.
appSettings.trialStartsOnWorkspace: The 14-day Pro trial starts when you create your first workspace.
appSettings.trialEnded: This account has already used its trial. Buy a license to enable Pro features again.
appSettings.languageNote: Only Indonesian is available for now.

landing.heroSubtitle: KaemForm — an Indonesian form builder for attendance, event registration, surveys, and more.

upgrade.modalDescription: This feature requires a Pro license.
upgrade.standaloneNote: Upgrade and billing are managed in Kaemnur. Sign in again or refresh your license after purchase.
